name: Ivanti Neurons Platform
summary: Unified cloud-native platform connecting ITSM, endpoint management, automation, and security-oriented workflows.
whyItMatters: One cohesive platform. Unified IT and security. Powered by AI.

name: Ivanti Neurons for ITSM
summary: Service management foundation for tickets, requests, approvals, self-service, and workflow automation.
whyItMatters: Modern IT service management software with automation and no-code configuration.

name: Incident Management
summary: Operational handling of incidents, assignment, communication, prioritization, and restoration of service.
whyItMatters: Core service desk process for incident intake, ownership, and resolution.

name: Problem Management
summary: Root-cause investigation, trend analysis, known error handling, and recurrence reduction.
whyItMatters: Problem analysis and prevention oriented process area.

name: Change Management
summary: Change planning, approvals, risk visibility, and controlled deployment governance.
whyItMatters: Structured control for change review and execution.

name: Service Request Management
summary: Request catalog design, fulfillment, approvals, and service delivery workflows.
whyItMatters: Standard request intake and fulfillment for IT and enterprise services.

name: Knowledge Management
summary: Knowledge article lifecycle, reuse, visibility, and support efficiency improvement.
whyItMatters: Knowledge authoring, publishing, and support reuse.

name: Reporting and Dashboards
summary: Operational dashboards, KPI views, trend reporting, and saved-search-based visibility.
whyItMatters: Reporting surfaces for operational visibility and stakeholder metrics.

name: Ivanti Neurons for UEM
summary: Unified endpoint management for discovery, management, securing, and healing of endpoints.
whyItMatters: Single-pane UEM for desktop, mobile, and IoT endpoints.

name: Ivanti Endpoint Manager
summary: Client-based endpoint administration for distribution, patching, inventory, and endpoint control.
whyItMatters: Enterprise endpoint management with software distribution and lifecycle actions.

name: Patch Management
summary: Patch assessment, staged rollout, compliance visibility, and remediation workflows.
whyItMatters: Controlled patch deployment and risk reduction.

name: Software Distribution
summary: Application/package rollout, targeting, scheduling, and deployment validation.
whyItMatters: Managed software delivery to endpoint groups.

name: Ivanti Neurons for MDM
summary: Modern device management across iOS, Android, macOS, ChromeOS, and Windows.
whyItMatters: Cloud mobile device management and lifecycle control.

name: Compliance and Policy
summary: Policy design, compliance states, remediation, and governance across managed devices.
whyItMatters: Rules, restrictions, and remediation for endpoint/mobile governance.

name: Mobile App Distribution
summary: Managed application rollout, ownership-aware delivery, and lifecycle support.
whyItMatters: Controlled app deployment to managed mobile devices.

name: Ivanti Neurons for ITAM
summary: Lifecycle tracking, visibility, repository alignment, and cost/risk-aware asset management.
whyItMatters: IT asset visibility from acquisition through retirement.

name: Ivanti Neurons for Discovery
summary: Network and endpoint discovery, normalized inventory, connectors, and visibility.
whyItMatters: Discovery and normalized visibility into assets and services.

name: Ivanti Neurons for GRC
summary: Authority documents, citations, controls, risks, assessments, and corrective actions.
whyItMatters: Governance, risk, and compliance workflows.

name: Ivanti Neurons Workspace
summary: Analyst workspace for faster issue resolution with 360-degree context and quick actions.
whyItMatters: Shift-left support experience with unified context.

name: Ivanti Neurons iPaaS
summary: Low-code/no-code integration with prebuilt connectors and bidirectional workflows.
whyItMatters: Embedded iPaaS with hundreds of connectors and workflow automation.

name: Ivanti Velocity
summary: Browser-based and scan-driven workflow optimization for frontline and warehouse teams.
whyItMatters: Frontline productivity through optimized mobile/browser workflows.
